business_rules: Use invoice_date for invoice sales questions when available.
Use so_date for sales order questions when available.
Revenue or sales amount usually means SUM(total_grand_amount), SUM(total_amount), or SUM(net_amount); choose the column that best matches the table and question.
For item-level revenue questions, prefer item/detail tables and group by product_name or item name when available.
For party/customer revenue questions, group by customer, party name, or party_id depending on available columns.
